business_ideas.idea: Fact-checker app to hold politicians accountable for lies in real-time.
Business Pocket: automated newsletter tracking competitor companies with news alerts filtered by type.
Competitor intelligence service: monthly deep-dive reports on rivals' ads, strategies, hypotheses.
AI/robotic pets for kids to replicate pet ownership without maintenance burden.
Weighted robotic pet for dementia/Alzheimer's patients for therapeutic comfort.

dynamics: Sam drives episodes with vivid personal stories (coal deal, Prince Andrew anecdote). Shaan provides structured research and business pattern recognition. Together they riff on reverse engineering frameworks. Energy stays high and explorative throughout, moving seamlessly between personal anecdotes and business model dissection.
frameworks: Reverse-engineer via Wayback Machine, TechCrunch archives, Twitter advanced search to see company evolution
CEO Doc timeline: apprenticeship phase → first hit → self-actualization across 500 founder profiles
Ask yourself: What would a PE firm do? (ruthless cost-cutting + marketing reallocation)
What would Larry Page do? (unbridled ambition, moonshot projects)
learnings: Track positioning shifts across time to infer strategic decisions; when Airbnb changed photography, funding followed
Luxury and heritage brands survive recessions better than trend-driven categories, lasting 50+ years
Reverse-engineering competitors' ads and strategies reveals what works without copying everything
Outsiders spot obvious fixes that insiders miss due to organizational baggage and sunk costs

banger_quotes.quote: If you're not embarrassed by V1 of your product, you launched too late.
They could not risk bribing foreign politicians, so they let this guy do it.
It didn't take a genius—just look at what Nike and Reebok did and do that.

numbers_dropped: Robo fish: 15 million units sold at $8 in first year
Rocket Internet cloned Uber (Mexico), Pinterest (Germany), Amazon (Brazil, Thailand)
Adidas: 3% market share to #2 brand under Dreyfus turnaround
Jesse Owens won 4 gold medals at 1936 Olympics in Adidas
notable: Prince Andrew visited and fell asleep during Shaan's presentation; Shaan just bought a handgun; Jake Paul interview announced for following episode; Indonesia coal story reveals real-world bribery infrastructure.
